buildCommand: npm run build && mkdir -p public/admin public/bg-image && cp dist/apps/api/src/assets/ui/command-center.html public/index.html 2>/dev/null || cp apps/api/src/assets/ui/command-center.html public/index.html && cp public/index.html public/admin/index.html && cp apps/api/src/assets/bg-image/bg-main.png public/bg-image/bg-main.png
installCommand: npm install --include=dev && cd apps/web && npm install
